title: Origins Accessibilities Fabric
description:
A fabric version of the mod origins accessibilities!
An origins add-on that makes your life easier.
body:
This is a fabricated version of [Oriacs](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-accessibilities)！
Oriacs, or Origins accesibilities, is a mod that enhances your origins gameplay.
The fabricated version has features including:
### Umbrella
Can be dyed, able to keep you from sunlight or rain damage.
### Landwalking helmet
Used for water origins to breathe on land.
### Fresh air effect
Gained by drinking fresh air bottle, which is obtained by right clicking with an empty bottle at high places.
### Chainmail armor
A lightweight armor that can be worn by flying species.
